description: Create the treb-forge workspace crate — the bridge between treb's configuration/registry system and foundry's compilation and script execution pipeline. All forge functionality is accessed through Rust crate APIs with no subprocess calls.

userStories.title: treb-forge Crate Scaffold and Foundry Dependency Wiring
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a treb-forge workspace crate with all foundry dependencies wired up so that downstream phases have a stable API for compilation and script execution.
acceptanceCriteria: crates/treb-forge/ directory exists with Cargo.toml and src/lib.rs
Crate added to [workspace.members] and [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml
forge-script and forge-script-sequence workspace dependencies added (git tag v1.5.1)
Crate depends on treb-core, treb-config, foundry-config, foundry-common, forge-script, forge-script-sequence, alloy-primitives, serde, serde_json, thiserror, anyhow, tokio, eyre
Module files exist: lib.rs, compiler.rs, script.rs, artifacts.rs, broadcast.rs, console.rs, version.rs
lib.rs declares all modules and re-exports key public types
Any needed [patch.crates-io] entries for foundry transitive deps are added to root Cargo.toml
cargo check --workspace passes with zero errors
cargo clippy --workspace passes with zero warnings

userStories.title: In-Process Compilation via ProjectCompiler
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a safe wrapper around ProjectCompiler that compiles Solidity projects without risking std::process::exit(0) so that treb can compile in-process reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: compiler.rs contains CompilationOutput struct with output: ProjectCompileOutput and project_root: PathBuf
compile_project(config) validates has_input_files() before compiling and returns TrebError::Forge if empty
compile_files(config, files) validates non-empty files vec and compiles specific files
CompilationOutput has has_compiler_errors() and artifact_ids() accessor methods
All eyre::Result errors converted to TrebError::Forge with original message preserved
Unit test: compile_project with empty project returns TrebError::Forge (not process exit)
cargo check --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace pass

userStories.title: ScriptArgs Construction from Treb Config
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to build ScriptArgs programmatically from treb's resolved configuration so that script execution parameters are set without clap argument parsing.
acceptanceCriteria: script.rs contains ScriptConfig builder struct with all specified fields (script_path, sig, args, target_contract, sender, rpc_url, chain_id, fork_url, broadcast, slow, debug, dry_run, gas_estimate_multiplier, legacy, non_interactive, etherscan_api_key, verify)
ScriptConfig::new(script_path) constructor with sensible defaults exists
Builder methods for each field return &mut Self or Self
into_script_args(self) constructs ScriptArgs from Default::default() and sets all fields including evm args
build_script_config(resolved, script_path) extracts RPC URL, sender, and slow flag from ResolvedConfig
Unit test: ScriptConfig::new(path).into_script_args() produces valid ScriptArgs with correct path and default sig 'run()'
cargo check --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace pass

userStories.title: Script Execution Pipeline and Result Extraction
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to drive the ScriptArgs state machine through full execution and extract structured results including decoded console.log messages so that downstream phases can consume execution output.
acceptanceCriteria: script.rs contains ExecutionResult struct with success, logs, raw_logs, gas_used, returned, labeled_addresses, transactions, and traces fields
execute_script(args) chains preprocess → compile → link → prepare_execution → execute and returns ExecutionResult
Each pipeline stage error is wrapped with context indicating which stage failed
console.rs contains decode_console_logs(logs) that filters for console.log address and decodes all variants
Unrecognized console log formats are silently skipped (not errors)
cargo check --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace pass

userStories.title: ContractsByArtifact Wrapper and Artifact Queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an ArtifactIndex wrapper around ContractsByArtifact so that downstream phases can look up contracts by name or bytecode through a stable API.
acceptanceCriteria: artifacts.rs contains ArtifactIndex struct wrapping ContractsByArtifact
from_compile_output(output) builds the index from CompilationOutput
find_by_name(name), find_by_creation_code(code), find_by_deployed_code(code) query methods exist
inner() provides access to underlying ContractsByArtifact for foundry API interop
ArtifactMatch struct contains artifact_id, name, abi, has_bytecode, has_deployed_bytecode fields
Unit test: ArtifactMatch construction and field access works correctly
cargo check --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace pass

userStories.title: Broadcast File Reader
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to read historical broadcast files from foundry's broadcast/ directory so that past deployment data is available as a supplementary data source.
acceptanceCriteria: broadcast.rs contains BroadcastData struct with sequence, chain_id, and timestamp fields
read_latest_broadcast(config, contract_name, chain_id) resolves broadcast dir and reads latest broadcast
read_all_broadcasts(config, contract_name, chain_id) returns all broadcasts sorted newest first
BroadcastTransaction struct with hash, contract_name, contract_address, function, tx_type fields exists
BroadcastData::transactions() maps sequence transactions to BroadcastTransaction
Error messages include broadcast directory path and contract name for debugging
cargo check --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace pass

userStories.title: Forge Version Detection and Integration Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want forge version detection from crate metadata and integration tests against a sample Foundry project so that the full compilation pipeline is validated end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: version.rs contains ForgeVersion struct with version and commit fields
detect_forge_version() reads version from foundry-config CARGO_PKG_VERSION
ForgeVersion::display_string() formats as 'forge v1.5.1' or 'forge v1.5.1 (abc1234)'
Test fixture exists at crates/treb-forge/tests/fixtures/sample-project/ with foundry.toml, src/Counter.sol, script/Deploy.s.sol
Integration test: compile_project against fixture succeeds and returns Counter artifact
Integration test: ArtifactIndex find_by_name('Counter') returns a match from compiled output
Integration test: detect_forge_version() returns non-empty version string
cargo test --workspace passes (all existing + new tests)
cargo clippy --workspace passes
